data.title: Facephi to Report Audited 2025 Financial Results on April 29, 2026
data.description: A global leader in digital identity verification and fraud prevention, Facephi, will be reporting its audited financial results for 2025 on April 29, 2026. The company's stock information includes BME Growth: FACE and PARIS: ALPHI. The announcement states that the report will be released after the market closes on April 29, 2026. Facephi will be hosting a webcast on May 5, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. CT to discuss the financial results. The event will be accessible via webcast. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: A New Chapter for Gaithersburg, MD: WRS Inc. Breaks Ground on Transformative $1.2 Billion Lakeforest Mall Redevelopment
data.description: In Gaithersburg, Maryland, on April 13, 2026, city officials, community leaders, and representatives from WRS Inc. came together to commemorate the commencement of the Lakeforest Redevelopment project. This innovative mixed-use initiative is set to rejuvenate the 102-acre Lakeforest site.

data.title: ClearThink 1 Acquisition Corp. Announces the Separate Trading of its Class A Ordinary Shares and Rights Commencing April 16, 2026
data.description: Boca Raton, Florida, April 13, 2026 - ClearThink 1 Acquisition Corp. disclosed that holders of its public units can opt to trade the Class A ordinary shares and rights associated with the units starting from April 16, 2026. The public units include one Class A ordinary share and one right to obtain one-fifth of another Class A ordinary share. For every five rights held, investors are entitled to acquire one Class A ordinary share upon the completion of a business merger. The company operates as a Cayman Islands exempted entity and is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CTAAU.

data.title: Global Cold Water Swelling Starch Market Set for Steady Growth as Functional Performance and Instant Solubility Drive Demand | Future Market Insights
data.description: In a recent market analysis by Future Market Insights, it was reported that the global cold water swelling starch market is experiencing consistent growth. This growth is primarily fueled by increasing interest in products offering instant solubility, functional viscosity, and application-specific benefits. The market data, from April 13, 2026, shows significant expansion in this sector.

data.title: Central Garden & Pet and Phillips Pet Food & Supplies to Launch Strategic Pet Distribution Joint Venture
data.description: Central Garden & Pet, a major player in the pet and garden sectors, revealed a partnership with Phillips Pet Food & Supplies to establish a joint venture for pet distribution. Trading under NASDAQ as CENT and CENTA, Central's collaboration with Phillips aims to enhance their distribution network by combining their strengths. Phillips, a prominent national pet product distributor, will merge with Central to create a more efficient and widespread distribution system. This strategic move signifies a significant step towards strengthening their presence in the market and further solidifying their positions in the industry.

data.title: Concrete Floor Coating Contractor Buffalo, NY Explained In HelloNation Featuring Concrete Coating Experts Ray McDougall And Mitch Wilkinson
data.description: A recent report provides essential guidance for Western New York residents seeking to assess contractors, materials, and installation techniques to ensure durable concrete coatings. In Clarence, N.Y., on April 13, 2026, insights were shared on the crucial factors that homeowners should evaluate before selecting a contractor for concrete coating projects in the region. This information is particularly relevant for individuals looking to make informed decisions on enhancing their property's aesthetics and durability.

data.title: National Dog Bite Prevention Week (April 12-18): AVMA emphasizes protecting children through education and supervision
data.description: In Schaumburg, Illinois, on April 13, 2026, it was reported that dogs continue to play a vital role in American families, providing companionship, emotional support, and valuable learning experiences for children. Despite the increasing number of households with dogs, incidents of dog bites still pose a notable concern in public health and safety.

data.title: AI Eyes Move Onto The Counter-Drone Battlefield As Defense Tech Companies Race To Fuse Video With RF
data.description: A modern wave of "video-as-a-sensor" systems is bridging the visual-confirmation void in RF-focused defense setups. Noteworthy tickers in this sector include VisionWave Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: VWAV), Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: PLTR), BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BBAI), and Kratos Defense & Security Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ: KTOS).

data.title: Textron Aviation Defense Awarded Five-Year Sustaining Engineering and Program Management Contract for Beechcraft T-6 Texan II Fleet
data.description: Textron Aviation Defense, based in Wichita, Kansas, has secured a renewed five-year SEPM contract to sustain over 700 Beechcraft T-6 Texan II aircraft. This contract solidifies their commitment to providing maintenance and support for a significant fleet of military training aircraft.

data.title: Newest Gorbel® Hoist Features Advanced Variable Frequency Drive Technology
data.description: Gorbel® has introduced an upgrade in Variable Frequency Drives (VFD) technology for industrial lifting applications in Fishers, New York on April 13, 2026. The new VFD promises improved control, precision, and productivity for demanding industrial tasks. This development marks a significant advancement in the industry as VFDs are increasingly becoming the preferred choice, setting a higher performance standard.

data.title: Bitcoin Needs To Close A Week Above $71,000 And The Rally Is On, Analyst Says
data.description: Bitcoin traders are closely monitoring whether the cryptocurrency can reclaim crucial technical levels amidst macroeconomic uncertainty. In the latest Technical Roundup podcast, trader DonAlt highlighted that Bitcoin's key level to watch is a weekly close above $71,000. Achieving this milestone would bolster the case for a sustained breakout, as a previous attempt was hindered by geopolitical turmoil. Despite a second attempt underway, DonAlt noted that consecutive failed breakouts are rare. Maintaining above $71,000 would likely indicate further upside potential, with the next significant resistance point seen at around $82,000. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Mouser Electronics Honored with Americas Distributor of the Year Award by Harwin
data.description: Mouser Electronics, Inc. based in Dallas & Fort Worth, Texas, has been recognized by Harwin as the Americas Distributor of the Year. Harwin, a renowned manufacturer of interconnect components, awarded Mouser for its outstanding performance in the fiscal year spanning April 2025 to March 2026. The recognition highlights Mouser's impressive sales and customer expansion during this period, in addition to its robust revenue growth. This achievement signifies Mouser's strong position as a top global distributor for cutting-edge electronic components and industrial automation products.

data.title: Green Bonds Market to Reach $1,555.1 billion, Globally, by 2033 at 10.1% CAGR: Allied Market Research
data.description: The green bonds market is experiencing significant growth due to increasing climate awareness, government regulations, and investor interest in sustainable investments. Government policies and financial institutions are endorsing green financing to address environmental concerns. Regulatory frameworks such as the EU Green standards are further boosting this trend. This market has seen a substantial increase in issuance, reaching $269.5 billion in 2020 compared to $215 billion in 2019. This growth is expected to continue as more entities prioritize eco-friendly investments.

data.title: BODYBAR Pilates Launches First-Ever National Ad Campaign Featuring Real Members, Instructors
data.description: In a groundbreaking move, BODYBAR Pilates, a prominent modern Pilates franchise based in FORT WORTH, Texas, unveiled its inaugural nationwide advertising initiative on April 13, 2026. The campaign is distinctive in its focus on genuine individuals and their authentic narratives, devoid of any paid actors. This marks a pivotal moment for the brand as it expands its reach across the country.
